description: Technical design document with implementation details
instruction:
Create the design document that explains HOW to implement the change.

When to include design.md (create only if any apply):
- Cross-cutting change (multiple services/modules) or new architectural pattern
- New external dependency or significant data model changes
- Security, performance, or migration complexity
- Ambiguity that benefits from technical decisions before coding

Sections:
- **Context**: Background, current state, constraints, stakeholders
- **Goals / Non-Goals**: What this design achieves and explicitly excludes
- **Decisions**: Key technical choices with rationale (why X over Y?). Include alternatives considered for each decision.
- **Risks / Trade-offs**: Known limitations, things that could go wrong. Format: [Risk] 脭氓脝 Mitigation
- **Migration Plan**: Steps to deploy, rollback strategy (if applicable)
- **Open Questions**: Outstanding decisions or unknowns to resolve

Focus on architecture and approach, not line-by-line implementation.
Reference the proposal for motivation and specs for requirements.

Good design docs explain the "why" behind technical decisions.
context: ## Stack tecnol鈹溾攤gica - HTML5, CSS3 e JavaScript puro (sem frameworks ou bibliotecas externas) - Sem ferramentas de build (sem npm, webpack ou bundlers) - Fonte customizada: "Ricky and Morty font" (arquivo .ttf local) ## API - Rick and Morty API REST p鈹溾晳blica: https://rickandmortyapi.com/api/character/ - Comunica鈹溌衡敎煤o via Fetch API nativa do browser - Dados consumidos: id, nome, status, esp鈹溌甤ie e g鈹溌琻ero do personagem - Imagem do personagem obtida como Blob e exibida via URL.createObjectURL() ## Dom鈹溌io - Aplica鈹溌衡敎煤o de p鈹溍璯ina 鈹溾晳nica (SPA sem roteamento) - Sorteia um personagem aleat鈹溾攤rio da API ao clicar no bot鈹溍簅 "Gerar" - Exibe imagem e informa鈹溌衡敎脕es do personagem em um grid ## Anima鈹溌衡敎脕es - Usa a Web Animations API (new Animation / KeyframeEffect) - Tr鈹溌瑂 anima鈹溌衡敎脕es encadeadas: portalAppearing 脭氓脝 portalSpinning (loop enquanto aguarda dados) 脭氓脝 portalFading - Sem鈹溍璮oro bin鈹溍璻io (readyData) sincroniza o t鈹溌畆mino do fetch com o fim da anima鈹溌衡敎煤o ## Cursor personalizado - Cursor em formato de "Portal Gun" implementado via elemento posicionado via JS - Rota鈹溌衡敎煤o polar em torno da imagem do personagem usando Math.atan2 - Suporte a eventos de ponteiro (mouse e touch) com setPointerCapture ## Responsividade - Layout e fontes redimensionados programaticamente nos eventos load e resize - Sem media queries; dimensionamento baseado em offsetHeight/offsetWidth dos elementos ## Conven鈹溌衡敎脕es de c鈹溾攤digo - "use strict" ativado - Nomes de vari鈹溍璿eis e fun鈹溌衡敎脕es em ingl鈹溌瑂 (camelCase) - Coment鈹溍璻ios explicativos em ingl鈹溌瑂 - Separa鈹溌衡敎煤o clara de se鈹溌衡敎脕es: DOM, API, Anima鈹溌衡敎脕es, Redimensionamento, Eventos
